import copy

def process_large_object(obj):
    results = []
    # Correct: deepcopy once outside the loop if the base object doesn't change
    base_copy = copy.deepcopy(obj)
    for i in range(100):
        # Use shallow copy or just update fields if possible
        item = copy.copy(base_copy)
        item.id = i
        results.append(item)
    return results
